title: Premier 90cm Lit Soft Acrylic Christmas Snowman 80 LEDs (LV191182) (White)

description: Product description Acrylic snowman, illuminated, 90 cm, with 80 white LEDs Safety Warning Make sure the device stays dry and is used away from flammable materials. Do not let children play near the device. Disconnect from the mains in bad weather.
